_description: Shot-by-shot production guide. Each shot tells you exactly what to attach, what to paste, and what you get. Follow in order — outputs feed into next shots.

ad.name: Symptom Stack — Sound Familiar?
ad.hook_line: Bloating. Fatigue. Brain fog. Skin flare-ups. Sound familiar?

storyboard: 0-3s  → HOOK: Bathroom mirror, tired morning, examining herself
3-4s  → HOOK: Breaks fourth wall, 'Sound familiar?' direct look
4-8s  → BODY: Kitchen counter, everyday foods, test kit revealed
8-11s → PROOF: Holding test kit close-up, examining it
11-13s → RESULT: Kitchen, better light, calm clarity face
13-15s → CTA: Product on counter, morning light, text overlay

shots.name: Bathroom Mirror — Tired Morning
shots.what_this_is: The scroll-stopper. She's in the bathroom examining herself, exhausted
shots.text_overlay: Bloating. Fatigue. Brain fog. Skin flare-ups.

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Bea avatar reference for face identity
prompt.subject: Subject is a 35-year-old American woman, South Asian-American heritage, medium brown skin with warm golden undertones. KEY IDENTITY MARKERS: (1) distinctive white/grey streak starting at left temple, approximately 1cm wide — very visible against dark hair, (2) small horizontal scar on chin, 8mm, slightly indented, (3) asymmetric eyebrows — left straighter/thinner, right higher arch. Hair dark brown/black in loose messy bun, pieces escaping. Under-eye circles are brown hyperpigmentation. Gold nose stud left nostril. Mismatched earrings: left small gold hoop, right tiny gold stud. No makeup. MATCH THE ATTACHED REFERENCE IMAGE FOR FACE IDENTITY
prompt.apparel: Oversized sleep shirt, washed-out grey or white, too big for her. Slipping off one shoulder slightly. Slept in this
prompt.expression: Tired resignation. Looking at herself — not at the camera lens, but at her own reflection (gaze 2-3 degrees downward-right). Examining her face and how tired she looks. Not dramatic, not crying. Just over it. The 'here we go again' morning face. Mouth closed, corners neutral-to-slightly-down. Eyes steady but heavy
prompt.action: Standing in front of bathroom mirror. One hand touching her jaw/chin area, examining her skin. Head tilted slightly. Morning stillness

camera.DOF: DEEP — everything in sharp focus, NO blur, NO portrait mode
camera.framing: Head, shoulders, upper chest. Slightly off-center. Selfie distance. Horizon tilted 2 degrees. Natural imperfect composition

prompt.lighting: Bathroom morning light. Overhead cool fluorescent mixed with soft window light from right. Unflattering — shows every under-eye circle, every skin texture. This is real morning light, not golden hour
prompt.environment: Bathroom. Mirror edge visible at frame edge. Toiletries slightly blurred on shelf behind her. White/beige tiles. Bathroom fan humming energy. All in sharp focus

shots.output_becomes: C004-01.jpg → Use as reference for C004-02 (Frame B)

shots.name: Fourth Wall Break — 'Sound Familiar?'
shots.what_this_is: Same scene but she looks directly at camera. Connection moment

attach.reference_1: C004-01.jpg (the output from previous shot — this is Frame A)

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Frame A (C004-01) — the bathroom mirror shot. This is the ONLY reference. Generate Frame B from this
prompt.instruction: Starting from the attached Frame A image, generate Frame B where ONLY the expression changes. Everything else stays identical — same bathroom, same clothes, same lighting, same framing, same hand position
prompt.expression_change: Her gaze shifts from looking at herself (down-right) to looking DIRECTLY into the camera lens. Direct eye contact. Right eyebrow lifts slightly higher (her natural asymmetry). Lips press together then release — a knowing look. 'Yeah, you too, right?' energy. This is the fourth wall break — she acknowledges the viewer. Expression at 30% intensity — subtle, not theatrical
prompt.what_stays_same: EVERYTHING except the expression and gaze direction. Same bathroom. Same lighting. Same clothes. Same hand position. Same background. Same framing

shots.output_becomes: C004-02.jpg → Combine with C004-01 in Veo for the animated hook
shots.veo_note: C004-01 + C004-02 → Veo interpolation → 2-3 second animated clip of the gaze shift

shots.name: Kitchen Counter — Food Trigger Reveal
shots.what_this_is: New scene. Kitchen. Everyday foods on counter with test kit visible among them
shots.text_overlay: these could be caused by foods you eat every single day

prompt.reference_images: Attached: (1) Bea avatar reference for face identity, (2) Combo test kit product image for product accuracy
prompt.subject: Same woman from avatar reference. KEY IDENTITY MARKERS: white/grey streak left temple, chin scar, asymmetric brows. Messy bun, no makeup, faded black v-neck tee (her default). MATCH THE ATTACHED AVATAR REFERENCE FOR FACE IDENTITY
prompt.expression: Looking down at the counter with a questioning expression. 'Could it really be you?' directed at the foods. Slight furrow between brows. Mouth slightly open (2-3mm). Curious but skeptical
prompt.scene: Kitchen counter from slightly above (she's standing, we see her from chest up + the counter surface). On the counter: a slice of bread, two eggs, a yogurt container, and a coffee mug — normal everyday breakfast items. The INFINITE ALLERGY LABS test kit box (FROM ATTACHED PRODUCT REFERENCE) is on the counter BEHIND the foods, partially visible. The foods are the visual focus, the test kit is secondary — emerging from among them
prompt.product_instructions: The test kit box must MATCH THE ATTACHED PRODUCT REFERENCE exactly — white rectangular box with navy INFINITE branding and geometric logo. The box is on the counter surface among the food items, not held. Natural placement, not displayed

camera.DOF: DEEP — sharp focus on face AND counter AND foods AND product
camera.framing: Medium shot — her chest/shoulders + counter surface with items. 9:16 vertical
camera.angle: Slightly elevated, looking down at counter but her face is visible

prompt.lighting: Kitchen morning light. Warmer than the bathroom (this scene is slightly more hopeful). Window light from left. Natural kitchen ambient
prompt.environment: Clean but lived-in kitchen. Neutral countertop. Maybe a cutting board edge visible. Morning context

shots.name: Product Close-Up — Examining the Kit
shots.what_this_is: Close-up of her hands holding the test kit. She's deciding, not presenting
shots.text_overlay: 88 foods tested · 4 immune pathways · results in 3-5 days

attach.reference_1: avatars/bea/reference.jpg (her face — for hand/skin tone consistency)

prompt.reference_images: Attached: (1) Bea avatar reference for skin tone and hand consistency, (2) Combo test kit product image
prompt.shot_type: HANDS + PRODUCT close-up. Her face is NOT in this shot or is barely visible at top edge of frame. This is about her HANDS holding the test kit box
prompt.hands: Medium brown skin with warm golden undertones (matching avatar reference). Black hair tie on right wrist. Nails are short, unpolished, slightly uneven — real nails. Fingers wrap around the short edge of the box. Casual grip like she just picked it up, not a display hold
prompt.product_instructions: The test kit box must MATCH THE ATTACHED PRODUCT REFERENCE exactly — white rectangular box, navy INFINITE wordmark at top, large navy geometric logo center, product name at bottom in navy. Box is approximately 22cm wide. Her thumb is near the branding, casually. Box is the hero of this shot

camera.DOF: DEEP — hands and product both in sharp focus
camera.framing: Close-up of hands holding box. Maybe chin/lower face visible at very top of frame. Counter surface visible below. 9:16 vertical
camera.angle: Slightly above, looking down at her hands and the box

prompt.lighting: Same kitchen lighting as C004-03. Warm morning light. Product branding clearly readable

shots.name: Clarity Face — The 'After'
shots.what_this_is: Back to her face. Same kitchen but she looks calmer. Tension gone. The subtle 'after'

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Bea avatar reference for face identity
prompt.subject: Same woman from avatar reference. KEY IDENTITY MARKERS: white/grey streak left temple, chin scar, asymmetric brows. Messy bun (slightly neater than bathroom scene — she's had some coffee). Faded black v-neck tee. MATCH THE ATTACHED AVATAR REFERENCE FOR FACE IDENTITY
prompt.expression: Quiet clarity. NOT a big smile. Settled. The tension from the bathroom morning scene is GONE. Eyes steady, face relaxed, jaw unclenched. A barely-there half smile — left side lifts slightly before right (her natural pattern). Warm eyes. 'I finally have a path forward' energy. Expression at 30% — this is SUBTLE relief, not celebration

camera.framing: Head and shoulders. Selfie distance. Slightly off-center. 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Kitchen but BETTER light than the bathroom — warmer, softer, more flattering. Window light from left. This isn't dramatic before/after — just slightly better light suggesting later in the day or a better angle. The improvement is in HER FACE (relaxed, calm), not in dramatic lighting change
prompt.environment: Kitchen background, soft focus ok here since face is the focus. Clean, bright, morning

shots.name: Product on Counter — CTA Shot
shots.what_this_is: The test kit box on her kitchen counter. Clean, simple. Text overlay does the selling
shots.text_overlay: most insurance accepted · free dietitian review · link in bio

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Combo test kit product image. Box must match this exactly
prompt.shot_type: PRODUCT LIFESTYLE. No face in this shot. The test kit box is the subject. But this is NOT a studio packshot — it's the box sitting naturally in her kitchen
prompt.product_instructions: The INFINITE ALLERGY LABS test kit box from the attached reference — white box, navy branding, geometric logo. Sitting flat on a kitchen counter. Slightly angled (not perfectly straight — real placement). Box is clean but not pristine
prompt.context: Kitchen counter surface. A coffee mug nearby (half-full). Maybe the edge of her hand/wrist resting near the box (brown skin, black hair tie on wrist if hand visible). Morning light. The box is IN HER LIFE, not in a studio

camera.DOF: DEEP — product and counter both sharp
camera.framing: Close-up of product on surface. Counter fills lower 2/3 of frame. 9:16 vertical
camera.angle: Slightly above, looking down at counter

prompt.lighting: Warm morning kitchen light. Window light from left. Product branding clearly readable. Soft shadows

shots.output_becomes: C004-06.jpg → Final shot. All 6 shots complete

generations_needed: C004-01: Avatar ref → GENERATE → bathroom scene
C004-02: C004-01 output → GENERATE → expression shift (Frame B)
C004-03: Avatar ref + Product ref → GENERATE → kitchen with foods + kit
C004-04: Avatar ref + Product ref → GENERATE → hands holding kit
C004-05: Avatar ref → GENERATE → calm clarity face
C004-06: Product ref only → GENERATE → product on counter

editing_notes.music: Quiet ambient. No upbeat music. Reflective/personal tone
editing_notes.transitions: Simple cuts. No effects. UGC doesn't use transitions
